header.title: Saint James the Greater church of Brousse-le-Chateau 10.jpg
header.description:
Saint James the Greater church of Brousse-le-Château, Aveyron, France





 
This building is inscrit au titre des monuments historiques de la France. It is indexed in the base Mérimée, a database of architectural heritage maintained by the French Ministry of Culture, under the reference PA00093977 .

header.title: Bridge over Abrance River in Brousse-le-Chateau 03.jpg
header.description:
Old bridge over Abrance River in Brousse-le-Château, Aveyron, France





 
This building is inscrit au titre des monuments historiques de la France. It is indexed in the base Mérimée, a database of architectural heritage maintained by the French Ministry of Culture, under the reference PA00093979 .
